[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced JSON code block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be change_task_state and the payload must match exactly:
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "441632bc-09cc-41a8-953d-e1333985fbbb",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "441632bc-09cc-41a8-953d-e1333985fbbb",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced JSON code block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be publish_artifact and the payload must match exactly:
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced JSON code block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be change_task_state and the payload must match exactly:
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "441632bc-09cc-41a8-953d-e1333985fbbb",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "441632bc-09cc-41a8-953d-e1333985fbbb",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
